## 🪹 CareerNest — Pull Request Definition

### 📝 Description
Provide a concise overview of the changes introduced in this PR. Mention any related issues or feature cards.
- **Related Issue:** Fixes #_ (or N/A)

---

### ⚙️ Type of Change
Select the appropriate category for these changes:
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 🐳 DevOps / CI/CD (Docker, Jenkins, Prometheus, Grafana or Workflow adjustments)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update

---

### 🧪 How Has This Been Tested?
Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions so we can reproduce.
- **Local Testing:** E.g., ran `docker-compose up`, checked local endpoints.
- **Verification Logs:** Attach screenshots, console logs, or Grafana dashboards below.

---

### ✅ DevOps & Quality Checklist
Before submitting, please ensure you satisfy all standard requirements:
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented on my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or console errors.
- [ ] Local build runs successfully via `npm run build` or `docker-compose up`.
- [ ] Jenkins Pipeline execution completed successfully.
- [ ] Exposed metrics have been verified in Prometheus (`/metrics` endpoint).

---

### 📊 Verification Screenshots / Proof
*Insert screenshots of the UI, terminal outputs, or Grafana charts showing the changes in action.*
